name: Sourdough Biscuits from Starter
recipeIngredient: 1 pint warm water or canned milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1 pint flour and 1 teaspoon salt with 1 pint warm water or canned milk. Beat into a smooth batter.
2. Keep in a warm place until well soured or fermented.
3. Add another teaspoon of salt, 1-1/2 teaspoons baking soda dissolved in 1/2 cup tepid water, and enough flour to make the dough easy to handle.
4. Knead until the dough is no longer sticky.
5. Form into biscuits and cook in a pan containing plenty of grease.
